Skip to navigation
MDXG Redline
No file

Pages

↑↓Enter
↑↓PgUp/PgDnfnav
No file loaded
Open a markdown file to start reviewing
↑↓Enterhpane
Select text in the file to add a review comment.
＋ Comment
Selected text
Add a review comment

Keyboard shortcuts

f
Focus the active page in the table of contents
g
Focus the document pane (then use ↑↓ / PgUp/PgDn to scroll)
h
Focus the comments panel (↑↓/Home/End to move between cards, Enter to jump to mark)
Tab
Move forward through TOC links and other controls
↑ / ↓
Move between TOC entries
Home / End
Jump to first / last TOC entry
Enter
Navigate to the focused entry
/
Open search
Enter / ⇧Enter
Next / previous search match (while search is open)
?
Show this help
Esc
Close any open modal, menu, or search
